title: A Bit Better Horse Armor
description: Horse armor: now a bit better!
body:
**This resource pack tweaks the appearances of Iron Horse Armor, Golden Horse Armor, and Diamond Horse Armor in a couple ways:**

**Custom Saddle Pads**

> The **Diamond Horse Armor** saddle pad is a deep turquoise with silver and black accents.
> 
> The **Golden Horse Armor** saddle pad is based off of activator rails. It's primary color is a dark, cool-toned brown which is accented by gray, red, & gold.
> 
> The **Iron Horse Armor** saddle pad is loosely inspired by iron ore. It's dark gray with tan and brown accents.

**Updated Color Palettes**

> The color palettes used for Iron Horse Armor & Diamond Horse Armor have been changed to match their player armor counterparts much more closely.
> 
> This primarily affects the Iron Horse Armor, which is now a lot lighter!
> The color palette used for Diamond Horse Armor only needed small tweaks, making the difference much harder to notice.
>
> Golden Horse Armor already shares its color palette with the Golden Armor worn by players, hence its exclusion.

### Comparison Screenshots:

![There are four horses, each one wearing a different set of horse armor. The resource pack, A Bit Better Horse Armor, has been applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d9928075aed04d75e58b3e0fb6b4c6fe90cf386.png)
![There are four horses, each one wearing a different set of horse armor. The resource pack, A Bit Better Horse Armor, has NOT been applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66e47e888964a4d554ff549bf3fe7bcda9bd532c.png)
---
![Two images are placed side by side. Both compare diamond & iron armor sets worn by horses versus those worn by players. The left image has the resource pack applied, while the right image doesn't.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9a99841d02be0084b752b5c34dafe5b90bc86b0.png)

---
---

_Big thanks to ["Horses stay still!" by SozoKa](https://modrinth.com/datapack/horses-stay-still) and ["Simply No Shading" by StartsMercury](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-no-shading) for making these showcase screenshots actually look good!_
